name: Asgard Weather
description: Stormy skies over the divine realm.

results.text: Divine Storm: Lightning deals d6 damage. 1-in-6 chance to charge a weapon (+2 lightning dmg).
Aurora Veil: Clarity and beauty. Touched by divine presence.
Sunlit Cold: Golden light. +1 to Fortitude Tests today.
Hail of Spears: Golden weapons rain down. Test Swift DR12 or take d6 damage.
Fimbulwinter's Gale: Howling wind. Subtract d4 from food. Extinguishes magical fire.
Idunn's Fallen Apple: Restore full HP, +1 to all Tests today. May invoke wrath.
Shattered Valkyrie Spear: Can be reforged to grant +2 Might vs Jotnar.
Runestone of Prophecy: d3 Runes. Visions of Ragnarok.
Einherjar Helm: +2 defence, but halver healing from rests (cursed with visions).
Forseti's Abandoned Scale: Take vengeance whenever wronged.
Golden Mead Flask: Restore 2d6 HP, +2 to flying. Test Wits DR12 to avoid gloom.
"Odin is watching everyone with rising paranoia."
"The Valkyries choose no more for Valhalla."
"Thor's hammer has been seen in mortal hands."
